title: MXA Tools
description:
添加一些我的世界风格辅助工具
Add some Minecraft-style AIDS
body:
**Basic Features**  
This mod can be considered a reboot version of [LX Light Assist Tool](https://modrinth.com/mod/lx-light-assist-tool).  
In addition to the unplaceable torch from the previous version, several new weapons and tools have been added. Most of them fully support resource packs, as they directly reference vanilla directories.  
Please understand that some translations from Chinese to English may not be entirely accurate.  

The mod is currently being continuously updated and enriched with new content. The supported versions will likely remain at 1.20.1 and any future versions supported by MCreator.  

There is a Chinese wiki


**基础功能**\
可以理解为[light assist tool](https://modrinth.com/mod/lx-light-assist-tool)的重置版本\
除了那个不可放置的火把以外添加了一些武器和工具，大都完全支持材质包（毕竟是直接调用原版目录的）\
有些地方中翻英不太准确请谅解\
目前mod正在持续更新以及丰富内容,版本可能会停留在1.20.1以及向上MCreator支持的版本\
有中文wiki了
